languages.original_text: "Oh, no one doubts that, Mistress Heydari. That is why the von Valancius dynasty has won glory for its name throughout the Koronus Expanse for hundreds of years, and you are famed only among the rapscallions of Footfall."

languages.text: "О, никто в этом не сомневается, госпожа Хейдари. Потому династия фон Валанциус сотни лет прославляет свое имя в Просторе Коронус, а вы известны разве что в кругах всяческой шушеры с Футфола".

"Oh, no one doubts that, Mistress Heydari. That is why the von Valancius dynasty has won glory for its name throughout the Koronus Expanse for hundreds of years, and you are famed only among the rapscallions of Footfall."
languages.original_text: "О, никто в этом не сомневается, госпожа Хейдари. Потому династия фон Валанциус сотни лет прославляет свое имя в Просторе Коронус, а вы известны разве что в кругах всяческой шушеры с Футфола".

traits.locale_text: "Oh, no one doubts that, Mistress Heydari. That is why the von Valancius dynasty has won glory for its name throughout the Koronus Expanse for hundreds of years, and you are famed only among the rapscallions of Footfall."

"Oh, no one doubts that, Mistress Heydari. That is why the von Valancius dynasty has won glory for its name throughout the Koronus Expanse for hundreds of years, and you are famed only among the rapscallions of Footfall."

"Oh, no one doubts that, Mistress Heydari. That is why the von Valancius dynasty has won glory for its name throughout the Koronus Expanse for hundreds of years, and you are famed only among the rapscallions of Footfall."

languages.text: 「ああ、誰もそんなことは疑いませんよ、ヘイダリーさん。それが、フォン・ヴァランキウス家は、何百年もの間、コーロナス・エクスパンスで名声を勝ち取ってきたのです。そして、あなたはそのフットフォールの悪党たちの中でしか名を知られていません」
languages.original_text: "Oh, no one doubts that, Mistress Heydari. That is why the von Valancius dynasty has won glory for its name throughout the Koronus Expanse for hundreds of years, and you are famed only among the rapscallions of Footfall."

traits.locale_text: 「ああ、誰もそんなことは疑いませんよ、ヘイダリー女史。それが、フォン・ヴァランキウス家は、何百年もの間、コロナス・エクスパンションで名声を勝ち取ってきたのです。そして、あなたはそのフットフォールの悪党たちの中でしか名を知られていません」

languages.text: « Oh, personne ici n'en doute, maîtresse Heydari. C'est bien pour cela que la dynastie von Valancius couvre son nom de gloire dans les Étendues de Koronus depuis des siècles, tandis que vous n'êtes connue que parmi les canailles de Castel. »
languages.original_text: "Oh, no one doubts that, Mistress Heydari. That is why the von Valancius dynasty has won glory for its name throughout the Koronus Expanse for hundreds of years, and you are famed only among the rapscallions of Footfall."

traits.locale_text: « Oh, personne ici n'en doute, maîtresse Heydari. C'est bien pour cela que la dynastie von Valancius couvre son nom de gloire dans les Étendues de Koronus depuis des siècles, tandis que vous n'êtes connue que parmi les canailles de Castel. »

languages.text: "Oh, das bezweifelt niemand, Herrin Heydari. Deshalb hat sich die Dynastie derer von Valancius in Hunderten von Jahren in der gesamten Koronus-Ausdehnung einen Namen gemacht, während Euch nur die Tunichtgute auf Footfall kennen."
languages.original_text: "Oh, no one doubts that, Mistress Heydari. That is why the von Valancius dynasty has won glory for its name throughout the Koronus Expanse for hundreds of years, and you are famed only among the rapscallions of Footfall."

traits.locale_text: "Oh, das bezweifelt niemand, Herrin Heydari. Deshalb hat sich die Dynastie derer von Valancius in Hunderten von Jahren in der gesamten Koronus-Ausdehnung einen Namen gemacht, während Euch nur die Tunichtgute auf Footfall kennen."

languages.text: "Bundan kimsenin şüphesi yok Üstat Heydari. İşte bu yüzden von Valancius hanedanlığı yüzlerce yıldır Koronus Enginliği'nin dört bir yanında adını şanla duyururken siz yalnızca Binliman'ın serseri güruhu arasında tanınıyorsunuz."
languages.original_text: "Oh, no one doubts that, Mistress Heydari. That is why the von Valancius dynasty has won glory for its name throughout the Koronus Expanse for hundreds of years, and you are famed only among the rapscallions of Footfall."

traits.locale_text: "Bundan kimsenin şüphesi yok Üstat Heydari. İşte bu yüzden von Valancius hanedanlığı yüzlerce yıldır Koronus Enginliği'nin dört bir yanında adını şanla duyururken siz yalnızca Binliman'ın serseri güruhu arasında tanınıyorsunuz."

languages.text: «Oh, eso no lo cuestiona nadie, señora Heydari. Por eso la dinastía von Valancius lleva cientos de años cubriéndose de gloria a lo largo y ancho de la Extensión de Koronus mientras a usted solo la conocen los rufianes de Paso».
languages.original_text: "Oh, no one doubts that, Mistress Heydari. That is why the von Valancius dynasty has won glory for its name throughout the Koronus Expanse for hundreds of years, and you are famed only among the rapscallions of Footfall."

traits.locale_text: «Oh, eso no lo cuestiona nadie, señora Heydari. Por eso la dinastía von Valancius lleva cientos de años cubriéndose de gloria a lo largo y ancho de la Extensión de Koronus mientras a usted solo la conocen los rufianes de Paso».

languages.text: “没人对此有所怀疑，海达利女士。正因如此，冯·瓦兰修斯王朝才能在科罗努斯扩区享誉数百年，而您的名头仅流传于落脚港的混混之间。”
languages.original_text: "Oh, no one doubts that, Mistress Heydari. That is why the von Valancius dynasty has won glory for its name throughout the Koronus Expanse for hundreds of years, and you are famed only among the rapscallions of Footfall."

traits.locale_text: “没人对此有所怀疑，海达利女士。正因如此，冯·瓦兰修斯王朝才能在科罗努斯扩区享誉数百年，而您的名头仅流传于落脚港的混混之间。”
